This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which have been associated with various health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and the treatment of respiratory infections. The most common herbal preparations made with Adamanthus tonduzii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions.
